title: Generalizable Structure-Aware Keypoint Correspondence for Category-Unified 3D Single Object Tracking
primary_category: Video: Low-level analysis, motion, and tracking
reason: The paper focuses on 3D single object tracking in point clouds, evaluated on autonomous-driving benchmarks.

title: DirectFisheye-GS: Enabling Native Fisheye Input in Gaussian Splatting with Cross-View Joint Optimization
reason: The paper focuses on multi-view 3D Gaussian Splatting reconstruction from native fisheye camera inputs with rendering-oriented optimization.

title: CompBench: Benchmarking Complex Instruction-guided Image Editing
secondary_categories: Image and video synthesis and generation
reason: The paper introduces CompBench, a benchmark for evaluating complex instruction-guided image editing models.

title: Choreographing a World of Dynamic Objects
primary_category: Image and video synthesis and generation
reason: 동적 4D 객체와 장면을 생성하는 범용 생성 파이프라인이 핵심이며 로보틱스 조작 정책 응용도 포함합니다.

title: Spk2VidNet: A Hierarchical Recurrent Architecture for High-Fidelity Video Reconstruction from Long Spike-Camera Streams
secondary_categories: Video: Low-level analysis, motion, and tracking
reason: The paper reconstructs high-resolution video from long spike-camera streams, a neuromorphic/event-style sensing modality with low-level video restoration goals.

title: Continual Distillation of Teachers from Different Domains
secondary_categories: Self-, semi-, meta- and unsupervised learning
reason: The paper proposes continual knowledge distillation across sequential teacher models and studies forgetting and transfer across domains.

title: GT-SVJ: Generative-Transformer-Based Self-Supervised Video Judge For Efficient Video Reward Modeling
primary_category: Image and video synthesis and generation
secondary_categories: Self-, semi-, meta- and unsupervised learning
reason: 비디오 생성 모델을 보상 모델로 재활용하고 self-supervised contrastive 학습으로 비디오 품질을 평가하는 논문입니다.

title: Beyond Euclidean Gossip: KL-Barycentric Consensus on Heterogeneous and Imbalanced Images
reason: The paper proposes a decentralized optimization and consensus method for scalable deep learning on heterogeneous, imbalanced image data.

title: HybridDriveVLA: Vision-Language-Action Model with Visual CoT reasoning and ToT Evaluation for Autonomous Driving
reason: The paper proposes a vision-language-action reasoning model specifically for autonomous driving trajectory planning and evaluation.

title: Training-free, Perceptually Consistent Low-Resolution Previews with High-Resolution Image for Efficient Workflows of Diffusion Models
primary_category: Image and video synthesis and generation
reason: The paper proposes a training-free efficient preview generation method for diffusion-based high-resolution image synthesis workflows.

title: Catalyst4D: High-Fidelity 3D-to-4D Scene Editing via Dynamic Propagation
secondary_categories: Image and video synthesis and generation
reason: 3DGS/NeRF 기반 정적 3D 편집을 동적 4D 장면 편집으로 확장하는 신경 렌더링 및 장면 생성/편집 논문이다.

title: Cloning Deterministic Worlds: The Critical Role of Latent Geometry in Long-Horizon World Models
secondary_categories: Self-, semi-, meta- and unsupervised learning
reason: The paper studies world models for embodied agents and improves long-horizon prediction through latent representation geometry and contrastive regularization.

title: CME-CAD: Heterogeneous Collaborative Multi-Expert Reinforcement Learning for CAD Code Generation
reason: 정사영 도면과 치수 주석을 바탕으로 편집 가능한 3D CAD 코드와 모델을 생성하는 비전-그래픽스 문제입니다.

title: Unique Lives, Shared World: Learning from Single-Life Videos
primary_category: Self-, semi-, meta- and unsupervised learning
secondary_categories: Video: Low-level analysis, motion, and tracking
reason: The paper proposes self-supervised training of visual encoders from egocentric single-life videos to learn transferable geometric representations.

title: Quantized Residuals to Continuous Prompts for Few-Shot Class Incremental Learning in Vision-Language Models
reason: The paper targets few-shot class-incremental learning in vision-language models using prompt adaptation and residual representations.

title: EcoSplat: Efficiency-controllable Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting from Multi-view Images
reason: The paper reconstructs 3D Gaussian Splatting scene representations from multi-view images with controllable efficiency for rendering.

title: UniComp: Rethinking Video Compression Through Informational Uniqueness
secondary_categories: Video: Low-level analysis, motion, and tracking
reason: 비디오 표현의 토큰 중복성을 줄여 제한된 계산 예산에서 압축 효율을 높이는 방법이 핵심이다.

title: AD-GBC: Anisotropic Granular-Ball Skip-Connection Refiner for UNet-Based Medical Image Segmentation
primary_category: Medical and biological vision, cell microscopy
reason: The paper proposes a UNet-based method specifically for medical image segmentation.

title: White-Balance First, Adjust Later: Cross-Camera Color Constancy via Vision-Language Evaluation
reason: The paper addresses color constancy and white balance, a low-level image restoration/enhancement problem, using VLM feedback for cross-camera robustness.

title: Reallocating Attention Across Layers to Reduce Multimodal Hallucination
reason: The paper targets hallucination reduction and reasoning reliability in multimodal large reasoning models via interpretable attention reallocation.

title: PanoEnv: Exploring 3D Spatial Intelligence in Panoramic Environments with Reinforcement Learning
reason: The paper benchmarks and improves VLM 3D spatial reasoning in panoramic synthetic environments using VQA data and reinforcement learning.

title: Erasing Thousands of Concepts: Towards Scalable and Practical Concept Erasure for Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
primary_category: Image and video synthesis and generation
secondary_categories: Transparency, fairness, accountability, privacy and ethics in vision
reason: The paper develops scalable concept erasure for text-to-image diffusion generation, motivated by safety and robustness against attacks.

title: TALON: Test-time Adaptive Learning for On-the-Fly Category Discovery
primary_category: Self-, semi-, meta- and unsupervised learning
reason: The paper focuses on discovering novel categories from unlabeled online streams via test-time adaptation while retaining known-category recognition.

title: SenseSearch: Empowering Vision-Language Models with High-Resolution Agentic Search-Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning
reason: The paper develops an agentic vision-language model for search-based visual reasoning with reinforcement-learned tool use.

title: REArtGS++: Generalizable Articulation Reconstruction with Temporal Geometry Constraint via Planar Gaussian Splatting
reason: 다중 뷰 RGB 기반 articulated object의 3D 표면 재구성과 joint parameter 추정을 다루는 논문입니다.

title: Quant Experts: Token-aware Adaptive Error Reconstruction with Mixture of Experts for Large Vision-Language Models Quantization
reason: The paper focuses on post-training quantization to reduce compute and memory costs for large vision-language models.

title: Efficient and High-Fidelity Omni Modality Retrieval
reason: The paper proposes an efficient text-vision-audio multimodal retrieval model and benchmarks it across retrieval tasks.

title: SynCLIP: Synonym-Coherent Language-Image Pretraining for Robust Open-Vocabulary Dense Perception
reason: The paper proposes CLIP-style language-image pretraining for robust open-vocabulary dense perception and grounding.
